subject: feat(pwa): add manual Check for Updates button in burger menu
body:
Store the SW registration in a ref so checkForUpdate() can call
registration.update() on demand. Button added to the burger menu
after Quick Tour — shows an info toast to confirm the check started.

Tags: pwa, update, burger-menu, ux
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: pwa-install
Semver: minor
